description: GenHTTP 11 on .NET 11 on a custom io_uring server engine (the ioxide runtime) instead of the default socket engine. Built from the GenHTTP ioxide-engine branch (PR #860). Responses go through GenHTTP's own routing + serialization; Postgres rides ioxide.pg (per-reactor ring-native pool) and json-tls rides ioxide.tls (kTLS TX) on :8081.
